contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Prefers cool conditions — flowers best in spring and autumn, not midsummer heat.

notes: Edible petals used as saffron substitute and in salads. Medicinal skin uses. Prefers cool conditions — blooms from early spring. Hardy annual that self-seeds freely. Long history of culinary and medicinal use.
